domain: Indian classical music 22-shruti microtonal system (Bharata Natyashastra, Carnatic/Hindustani): 22 microtonal subdivisions per octave; 12 swara (notes) mapped onto the 22 shruti; each raga selects subset of shruti; tanpura provides drone anchor; gamaka ornamental shift between shruti.
specific_mechanism: SHRUTI-22-MICROTONE-12-SWARA-RAGA-DRONE-GAMAKA: (1) S_22shruti 22 microtonal allocation; (2) S_12swara 12-swara mapping; (3) R_raga raga-specific shruti selection; (4) T_drone tanpura canonical anchor; (5) G_gamaka ornamental shift.
llm_application: SHRUTI mechanism + S_22shruti + S_12swara + R_raga + T_drone + G_gamaka. Differs from R582/R507/R520/R532/R545/R557/R570. Differs from spectral-allocation literature by 22-microtone + 12-swara mapping + raga selection + drone anchor + gamaka shift.
novelty_claim: Spectral-allocation lit broad. SHRUTI adds 5-mechanism composite. K=5.
content_words: indian classical 22 shruti microtonal bharata natyashastra carnatic hindustani
